name: Chat
description: Conversational grammar tutor with bilingual modes, history, and an editor toolbar.

quickChips.label: Check grammar
quickChips.text: Please check my grammar in this sentence:

quickChips.label: Tense rules
quickChips.text: Explain English tense rules with simple examples.

quickChips.label: Common mistakes
quickChips.text: Tell me 5 common English mistakes Indians make.

quickChips.label: Quiz
quickChips.text: Give me a short 5-question grammar quiz.

quickChips.label: Articles
quickChips.text: When do I use a, an, and the?
